MINI-MINUTES FOR MAR-05-2007 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, CROSS-DEFENDANT JOSE CABALLERO'S DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT. AS TO CAUSES OF ACTION 1 & 2 SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND TO PLEAD HOW CROSS-DEFENDANT BREACHED THE CONTRACT OF ITS IMPLIED COVENANT. AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 3, SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND TO PLEAD A CONNECTION BETWEEN CROSS-COMPLAINANTS TRADE OR BUSINESS, OR HOW ANY SLANDER BY CROSS-DEFENDANT INJURED THAT TRADE OR BUSINESS WITHIN THE MEANING OF CC 46(3) OR TO PLEAD SPECIAL DAMAGES. AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 4, SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND BECAUSE THE E-MAILS CANNOT CONSTITUTE ASSAULT. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: MITCH LYON, CSR 6840

MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
CROSS DEFENDANT JOSE CABALLERO'S DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT. AS TO CAUSES OF ACTION 1 & 2 SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND TO PLEAD HOW CROSS-DEFENDANT BREACHED THE CONTRACT OF ITS IMPLIED COVENANT. AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 3, SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND TO PLEAD A CONNECTION BETWEEN CROSS-COMPLAINANTS TRADE OR BUSINESS, OR HOW ANY SLANDER BY CROSS-DEFENDANT INJURED THAT TRADE OR BUSINESS WITHIN THE MEANING OF CC 46(3) OR TO PLEAD SPECIAL DAMAGES. AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 4, SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND BECAUSE THE E-MAILS CANNOT CONSTITUTE ASSAULT. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Mitch Lyon, CSR 6840
